description: Reference values for linear scaling nonlocal pseudopotential benchmark

sp.description: sp basis with sp3 hybridization weighting (25% s, 75% p)

notes: s_only gives positive nonlocal energy because s-wave D values are positive
sp basis includes p-wave contribution with negative D values (attractive)
sp basis gives more physically reasonable nonlocal energy
sp basis is ~1.6x slower due to computing 4x more projector overlaps
